themes.headline: Highest-ever quarterly operating profit ₹3.78 bn; PAT ₹3.96 bn
themes.detail: Fastest growing AMC in Top-10 on both QoQ and YoY basis.

themes.headline: Highest increase in AUM market share industry-wide in the quarter
themes.detail: Market share 8.49% — highest since June 2019. Improvement across most asset classes.

themes.headline: SIP market share >10% in June '25; Equity Net Sales market share double-digit
themes.detail: Both materially above Equity AUM market share.

themes.headline: SIF team in place under industry-veteran Andrew Holland
themes.detail: Products to launch in due course — investment in foundational capability.

events.label: Andrew Holland appointed Head of New Asset Class (SIF)
